rows.label: tev010801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Quincy about the recently
discovered survivors.

rows.label: tev010801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Quincy if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Quincy about the Collepedian Union.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Quincy about Soul Voices.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0091
rows.name:
Ask Quincy about his
thoughts on Lao's betrayal.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0111
rows.name:
Ask Quincy about the Earthlife
Colonization Project.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Quincy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Quincy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev010801_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask Quincy if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Director General Chausson
announced that 10 new crew
members have been discovered![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those people are our lost soul mates!
The last surviving crew members that
came with us from Earth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm so glad that they survived. We'll have
to say a prayer for our new friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0005
rows.name:
I wonder if they'll become
BLADEs? If they do, I think
I'll invite them to join my team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Every Union hosts a number of different
teams. There's all sorts of reasons
why BLADE operatives team up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Some teams are intentionally formed to pair BLADEs with
complimentary abilities together, while others are just
groups of BLADEs who were free at the same time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But the best teams are the ones like
mine—true friends who work well together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Do you know Gus? He's another team leader, and he
always expresses great admiration for how well my
team work together. I think he's a little jealous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0013
rows.name:
I sure hope that you're able to
find a good group of friends to
team up with here in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Our main duties as Collepedian are
surveying Mira and gathering
collectibles and other resources.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Visiting unexplored lands to find
and collect such materials can be
an extremely dangerous job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0023
rows.name:
A number of Collepedian have already lost their lives in
the line of duty. But Team Quincy has nothing to fear so
long as we're protected by the power of friendship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0024
rows.name:
We're going to find all of Mira's
hidden treasures and bring them
back home to NLA! Go team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0039
rows.name:
When Team Quincy encounters one of
the dangerous creatures that populate
Mira, we know what to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0040
rows.name:
We call out to each other, appraise
the situation, and stir up our souls
that reside deep within us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0041
rows.name:
We fellow BLADEs are soul mates,
and our voices reverberate between
our souls! Soul Voices![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0042
rows.name:
With a good command of Soul Voices, you won't have
any reason to fear. Even these new enemy xenoforms
will be easy pickings for the likes of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0043
rows.name:
Make sure you listen to the
voices of your teammates during
battle and energize your soul![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0078
rows.name:
I never imagined that a fellow
BLADE would defect to the Growth
like that. We're soul mates![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0079
rows.name:
That sort of thing just
isn't supposed to happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0080
rows.name:
I'm sure the Growth just found some weakness
of his and threatened him with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0081
rows.name:
The Growth are using their cowardly tactics
to pull at the bonds of love which unite
us. We can't let them get away with it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0085
rows.name:
My family wasn't able to secure a
berth on the White Whale either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0086
rows.name:
But that's exactly why I consider the
surviving crew— especially my fellow
BLADE soul mates—as my new family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0087
rows.name:
There was a lot of controversy
around the selection process, and
I know a lot of people were upset.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0088
rows.name:
But what's done is done, and there's no point living
in the past. Now is the time to forge new bonds, look
straight ahead, and march to a brighter future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0053
rows.name:
Our remaining objectives have been
completed. I believe my companions
can rest in peace. Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0054
rows.name:
Looking back on it, I have
a lot of pity for Gus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0055
rows.name:
He never got to experience the depth
of love we BLADEs share. He only ever
let heartless greed drive him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0056
rows.name:
And then he died alone, having
never experienced the powerful
emotions we feel for each other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0057
rows.name:
To be honest, I suppose it does bother me
that I was taken in by Gus like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0058
rows.name:
But I'm happy that the experience
led me to become friends with as
wonderful a BLADE as yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0059
rows.name:
Knowing good people like you makes me all the
more confident that my teammates were right to
trust Gus, even though it cost them their lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0060
rows.name:
I'm going to keep walking the righteous path—I
won't let this experience make me lose trust in
my fellow man. I have you to thank for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0061
rows.name:
Have you heard the stories about
how the Celeste Three worked
together to assault people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0062
rows.name:
Their front man, Fosdyke, had been
a popular and widely-trusted member
of the White Whale's crew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0063
rows.name:
I can't believe Fosdyke was involved with this.
How could he have forgotten the oath he swore
when the White Whale set off from Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0064
rows.name:
But then I remember that there
are also righteous BLADEs like
you who are worthy soul mates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010801_MSG0065
rows.name:
To maintain the unity of BLADE when traitors
emerge, we righteous men and women simply have
to grasp hands all the tighter. ...Right?[ST:wait ]
